argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = Math.min({{ limit }} + 10, 50); const res = await fetch('https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/jobstories.json'); const ids = await res.json(); const items = ids.slice(0, limit); const results = []; for (const id of items) { const itemRes = await fetch('https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/item/' + id + '.json'); const item = await itemRes.json(); if (item.title && !item.deleted && !item.dead) { results.push({ rank: results.length + 1, title: item.title, author: item.by, url: item.url }); if (results.length >= {{ limit }}) break; } } return results; }
